citations.narrative:
During review of paperwork and records, it was noted that the acquisition records were incomplete. All required
information about whom the animals were purchased or otherwise acquired from was unavailable at the time of
inspection.
Appropriate documentation of regulated animals is essential for proper identification, to trace and track animals in case of
disease outbreak, identify animals being used in regulated activities, and to ensure all parties that are required to be
licensed have a current, valid license.
The facility shall make, keep and maintain records that fully and correctly include all the required acquisition and
disposition information, including: the name and address of the person from whom the animals were acquired, the USDA
license number of the person if licensed or the vehicle license number and state and driver’s license number and state if
not licensed, the name and address of the person to whom an animal was given/sold, the date of acquisition or
disposition, the species of animal and the number of animals involved.
To be corrected from April 16, 2026 going forward.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
n

narrative:
2.75(b)(1) 
   
Records: Dealers and exhibitors. 
During review of paperwork and records, it was noted that the acquisition records were incomplete. All required 
information about whom the animals were purchased or otherwise acquired from was unavailable at the time of 
inspection.  
 
Appropriate documentation of regulated animals is essential for proper identification, to trace and track animals in case of 
disease outbreak, identify animals being used in regulated activities, and to ensure all parties that are required to be 
licensed have a current, valid license. 
 
The facility shall make, keep and maintain records that fully and correctly include all the required acquisition and 
disposition information, including: the name and address of the person from whom the animals were acquired, the USDA 
license number of the person if licensed or the vehicle license number and state and driver’s license number and state if 
not licensed, the name and address of the person to whom an animal was given/sold, the date of acquisition or 
disposition, the species of animal and the number of animals involved. 
 
To be corrected from April 16, 2026 going forward. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
